mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO neighborhood (li_code, name, full_name, district, city, lat, lng, status, boundary) VALUES
( #{n.liCode}, #{n.name}, #{n.fullName}, #{n.district}, #{n.city}, #{n.lat}, #{n.lng}, #{n.status}, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(#{n.boundaryGeoJson}) )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), full_name = VALUES(full_name), district = VALUES(district), city = VALUES(city), lat = VALUES(lat), lng = VALUES(lng), status = VALUES(status), boundary = VALUES(boundary), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, li_code, name, full_name, district, city, lat, lng, status FROM neighborhood WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND boundary IS NOT NULL AND ST_Contains( boundary, ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lng}, ' ', #{lat}, ')'), 4326) ) LIMIT 1

SELECT id, li_code, name, full_name, district, city, lat, lng, status FROM neighborhood WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND boundary IS NOT NULL AND ST_Intersects( boundary, ST_GeomFromText(#{circleWkt}, 4326) ) ORDER BY ST_Distance_Sphere( ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', lng, ' ', lat, ')'), 4326), ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lng}, ' ', #{lat}, ')'), 4326) )
